title: AutoShieldStun
description:
🛡️ AntiShield Mod

A lightweight client-side utility mod that improves combat efficiency by helping you deal with shield users more effectively.
body:
🛡️ AntiShield Mod

A lightweight client-side utility mod that improves combat efficiency by helping you deal with shield users more effectively.

⚙️ Features
- Automatic hotbar switching to an axe when needed
- Detects valid targets in your crosshair
- Quick attack execution for smoother combat
- Automatically switches back to your previous slot
- Toggle on/off using a customizable keybind

🎮 How It Works
When enabled, the mod monitors your combat situation and helps streamline your actions by reducing the time needed to switch items and attack. This gives you faster response time in PvP scenarios.

🧩 Compatibility
- Fabric Loader
- Client-side only
- Works with modern Minecraft versions (1.21.x)

⚠️ Note
This mod is designed for convenience and improved gameplay responsiveness. Always use it in accordance with server rules.
